hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f package.json ] && (grep -q react-native package.json 2>/dev/null || [ -f app.json ]); then echo "React Native project detected. Use /rn-dev-agent:test-feature to test features, /rn-dev-agent:debug-screen to debug, or /rn-dev-agent:check-env to verify setup."; fi'
hooks.description: Detect React Native project and hint available commands
